data.description:
Goal:
When an overview column has appeared once, keep it visible after its count falls back to zero and show a hide control only while it is empty. If entries return, hide that control and keep the existing width-stability behavior.

Verification:
1. Run focused overview/column tests and confirm they pass.
2. Run bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build after dependencies are installed in the worktree.
3. In the overview UI, confirm a previously populated column remains visible at count 0 with a hide control, the control removes the empty column, and the control disappears when count becomes nonzero.

Constraints:
Preserve existing column width anti-jitter behavior. Do not add a PR workflow.
